news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Bloomberg R&D Leaders ETF

holdings.infoBox: RND is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 8.81%, NVIDIA at 8.18%, Apple at 8.13%, Amazon.com at 7.95%, and Microsoft at 7.14%.

overview.description: The First Trust Bloomberg R&D Leaders ETF (RND) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg R&D Leaders Select TR index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 30-50 US stocks with substantial expenditures dedicated to research and development. RND was launched on Apr 30, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Bloomberg R&D Leaders ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
